modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to add a red button to myUSD Quick Links

full_description_text:  
The user is requesting the addition of a new service to the Quick Links section of the myUSD portal. They specifically want this service to be represented as a red button for better visibility. This request indicates a need for improved access to services within the portal, which may enhance user experience. The user submitted this request through a self-service form, reflecting their desire for a more efficient navigation option.
